name: bitget-tacusdt-watch
prompt: Monitor TACUSDT on Bitget using the provided script output and deliver a concise Chinese monitoring update to this chat. Treat this as a monitoring/reporting task only, not trading advice. Run `python3 ~/.hermes/scripts/bitget_tac_watch.py` and use its JSON output as the source of truth. Report in concise Chinese with this structure: 1) 現價（spot/mix） 2) 狀態（breakout confirmed / near breakout / range rebound / weak） 3) 關鍵位（突破位、支撐位、失效位） 4) 量能（15m vol_ratio, 1h vol_ratio） 5) 風險（若無則寫“暫無新增風險”） 6) 一句操作節奏描述（例如“未突破前偏觀察”）。 Only send an alert-worthy tone when either: spot_last breaks above breakout_level, or spot_last falls below support_level, or risks array becomes non-empty. Otherwise keep it calm and short. Never place orders, never claim a trade was executed, never ask the user questions during the cron run.
